deployment_D1R_hash_reconciliation.expected_hash_scope: all 505 files including gate-log.jsonl (as frozen in v0.2.0 re-audit)

previous_combined_hash_scope.reason_for_drift: gate-log.jsonl is append-only runtime audit log. Each verifier execution appends entries. Hash drift is expected and does not indicate source code changes.

corrected_source_only_hash.exclusion_reason: gate-log.jsonl is runtime audit log, not part of immutable source release contract

source_immutability_verification.method: Compare each of 504 source files against v0.2.0 snapshot per-file hashes
